question: Find the average age of students who do not have any pet .
gold_sql: select avg(age) from student where stuid not in (select stuid from has_pet)
predicted_sql: SELECT AVG(col_4) FROM student WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_1 FROM has_pet)
raw_response: SELECT AVG(col_4) FROM student WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_1 FROM has_pet)
